creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191864
anki-2.0.51.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch, which updates anki to 2.0.51 . The changes are listed at https://apps.ankiweb.net/docs/changes.html .

Note:
I did a diff between the 2.0.50 and 2.0.51 sources and the only change is a bump of the version number. 

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
